_comment: TEST FIXTURE — not a real governance decision. The event_id, decided_by, and scope pubkeys are placeholder digests (all-d / all-a), NOT real content-addressed hashes. Governance decisions are content-addressed by their event_id; this record's id is a stub. Retained as a sample/fixture only — do not treat as an authoritative decision and do not let it into the content-addressed decision set.
